c.d: The number of active users on the app, which affects the potential audience size for listings
How quickly and simply users can create and publish item listings, including photo uploads and description entry
Commission fees, payment processing fees, or listing fees charged by the app on sales
Availability and flexibility of shipping methods including prepaid labels, local pickup, and home pickup
Range of item types and categories allowed or popular for sale on the app
Whether the app focuses on local buyers/sellers or offers nationwide sales options
Overall ease of use, app interface quality, and availability of seller tools like analytics
Measures and features to protect users from fraud and ensure safe transactions
